name: Secret Kiss Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chocolate Kisses or Carob Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the butter and granulated sugar together at medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Add the powdered sugar and vanilla extract to the mixture, stirring gently until well combined.
3. Gradually mix in the flour until the dough is smooth and holds its shape when formed into balls.
4. Refrigerate the dough for 2 hours to allow it to firm up.
5. Roll about one tablespoon of dough around each chocolate kiss or carob chip, shaping them into a ball that completely encases the candy.
6. Place the shaped cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8-10 minutes, or until set but not browned.
8. Remove from the oven and roll each cookie in powdered sugar to dust lightly.
9. Repeat with remaining dough balls. This recipe yields approximately 36 cookies.
